ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tour the participant is registered in */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household of the participant */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the person in the participant's record */,
  "participant_num" INTEGER /* Number representing the participant's position in the household */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the participant */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions or allergies of the participant */,
  "participant_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., 'registered', 'checked-in', 'completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_tour_id FOREIGN KEY ("tour_id") REFERENCES tours ("tour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tours" (
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tour */,
  "tour_name" TEXT /* Name of the tour */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the tour (e.g., '2 days', '3 hours') */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tour takes place */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the tour */,
  "tour_type" TEXT /* Type of the tour (e.g., 'nature', 'history', 'food') */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the tour (e.g., 'easy', 'moderate', 'challenging') */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the tour */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "household_name" TEXT /* Name of the household (e.g., surname) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the household */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the household */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the household */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "persons" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the person */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the person */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the person */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the person */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tour_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant providing feedback */,
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tour being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., 'positive', 'negative', 'neutral') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tour_feedback_tour_id FOREIGN KEY ("tour_id") REFERENCES tours ("tour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tour_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tour_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tour taken */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date the tour was taken */,
  "tour_completion_status" TEXT /* Status of tour completion (e.g., 'completed', 'incomplete') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tour_histories_tour_id FOREIGN KEY ("tour_id") REFERENCES tours ("tour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tour_histories_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tour_guide" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tour guide */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tour guide */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the guide */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization field of the guide (e.g., 'history', 'flora and fauna') */,
  "guide_email" TEXT /* Email address of the tour guide */,
  "guide_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the tour guide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tour_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tour scheduled */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the tour */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the tour */,
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the guide leading the tour */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Status of the tour schedule (e.g., 'upcoming', 'in-progress', 'completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tour_schedule_tour_id FOREIGN KEY ("tour_id") REFERENCES tours ("tour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tour_schedule_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES tour_guide ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant making the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid by the participant */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., 'credit card', 'cash') */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., 'paid', 'pending', 'failed') */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'admin', 'tour manager') */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
